channel.title: Karnail Singh Paras on amardeepsidhu.com
channel.description: Recent content in Karnail Singh Paras on amardeepsidhu.com

item.title: alwida Paras saab
item.description: Karnail Singh Paras saab sade darmiyan nahi rahe. 28 Feb nu oh es faani sansaar nu alwida keh gaye ne. ik beshumaar keemti den hai uhna di Punjabi sahit nu. kavishri nu ik nava rang, roop te darja ditta. Punjabi sahit naal judia rehan wala sahyad e koi banda hove jihda una de kalam da jaadu dekh ke ash ash na kar uthia hove. sahit to ilaawa uhna di ik hor waddi den Punjabi nu Harbhajan Mann & Gursewak Maan de roop ch…bachian wangu dona nu paalia te sikhaya. Harbhajan aksar gallan karda interviews wagaira ch k kive oh sanu dasde c stage te khade hon baare, mic faran baare, shabdan de shudh ucharan baare te jado hek launi tan kive baanh uchi chakkni. te nateeja sahmne hai Harbhajan di kabaliyat har taran de geet gaun di.

item.title: Paras - sadi Punjabi da wara(i)s...
item.description: kaafi sama ho gia mainu ethe post kite hoye.aj orkut surf kardian kardian ik video milia jihne mainu ethe post karan lai utshahit kita. eh video hai harbhajan mann & gursewak mann kathe ga rahe. karnail singh paras horan di kavishri. mere hisaab naal koi 17-218 saal de aas paas pehlan da hona eh. rare of rarest cheez. dhanwaad us bai ji da jihna ne upload kita. har punjabi nu eh video jaroor dekhna chahida. karnail singh paras hori punjabi kavishri de thamm. te eh video ik adbhut yaad hai uhna samian di. i would love to see both of them like this again. i wish they do an album together in this style, dhad sarangi lai ke !
